refs.description: A clean, self-contained PrefixSum class with build and range-sum query methods, including doctests.
Popular educational repo of JavaScript algorithm and data structure implementations covering range-sum and scan techniques.
NumPy's cumsum implements the prefix-sum scan as an accumulate ufunc loop in its core math kernels.
PyTorch implements torch.cumsum as a cumulative scan operation used throughout tensor and autograd computations.
